name: Options for changing base game settings.
Ranked Game
desc: Should game results affect OpenSkill. Note that games with AI or games that are not balanced are always unranked.

name: Allow Custom Widgets
desc: Allow custom user widgets or disallow them

name: Allow Custom 'Unit Control' Widgets
desc: Allow custom user 'unit control' widgets or disallow them

name: Allow Commands While Paused
desc: Allow giving unit commands while paused
Keep in mind there is an absolute limit of units, 32 000, divided between each team. If you set this value higher than possible it will force itself down to the maximum it can be.
name: Max Units Per Player

items.name: Kill all enemy Commanders
items.desc: When a team has no Commanders left, it loses

items.name: Territorial Domination
items.desc: Teams earn points by capturing territory to stay in the game. At the end of the final round, the team with the most points wins.

items.name: Kill all Builders
items.desc: When a team has no builders left, it loses

items.name: Kill everything
items.desc: Every last unit must be eliminated, no exceptions!

items.name: Player resign on Com death
items.desc: When player commander dies, you auto-resign.

name: Game End Mode
desc: What it takes to eliminate a team

items.name: 4 Rounds, 20 Minutes
items.desc: Early tech emphasis, comebacks very likely, elimination unlikely.

items.name: 5 Rounds, 25 Minutes(Default)
items.desc: Mid/late-game tech, comebacks a significant factor, eliminations uncommon

items.name: 6 Rounds, 30 Minutes
items.desc: Late-game tech, comebacks less significant, eliminations likely

items.name: 7 Rounds, 35 Minutes
items.desc: Super lategame tech, eliminations extremely likely

name: Territorial Domination Length
desc: Configures the grace period and the amount of time in minutes it takes to reach the maximum required territory.
Teams are eliminated at round end when score < elimination threshold which is set by highest score multiplied by this value. Lower values are more lenient.
name: Elimination Threshold Multiplier

items.name: Disabled
items.desc: Disable draft mod. Fast-PC place first.

items.name: Random Order
items.desc: Players get to pick a start position with a delay in a random order.

items.name: Captains First
items.desc: Captain picks first, then everyone else in a random order.

items.name: After full team has loaded
items.desc: Everyone must join the game first - after that (+2sec delay) everyone can place.

name: Draft Spawn Order Mode
desc: Random/Captain/Skill/Fair based startPosType modes. Default: Random.

items.name: Shuffle Globally
items.desc: You can distinguish different players and everyone sees the same colors globally. Diplomacy is the same as usual except using colors instead of names (e.g. "Red, let's ally against Blue").

items.name: Shuffle Locally
items.desc: You can distinguish different players but everyone sees different colors locally. Diplomacy is harder but possible using positions (e.g. "Southeast, let's ally against Northeast").

items.name: Shuffle Locally (Continiously)
items.desc: Same as local shuffle, except that colors are reshuffled every 2 mins for extra spicyness.

items.name: Everyone Is Red
items.desc: You cannot distinguish different players, they all have the same color (red by default, can be changed in accessibility settings). Diplomacy is very hard.

name: Anonymous Mode
desc: Anonymize players by changing colors (based on chosen mode) and replacing names with question marks, making it harder to know who's who.

items.name: All But Commanders
items.desc: Only commanders are immune to napping

items.name: Disallow All
items.desc: No enemy units can be napped

name: Enemy Transporting
desc: Toggle which enemy units you can kidnap with an air transport

name: Shuffle TeamFFA Start Boxes
desc: In TeamFFA games (more than 2 teams, excluding Raptors / Scavengers), start boxes will be randomly assigned to each team: team 1 might be assigned any start box rather than team 1 always being assigned start box 1.

name: Disabled Dynamic Alliances
desc: Disables the possibility of players to dynamically change alliances ingame

name: Disable Map Deformation
desc: Prevents the map shape from being changed by weapons

name: Disable Fog of War
desc: Disable Fog of War

Set timer in which players cannot get out of their startbox, so you have time to prepare before fighting.
PLEASE NOTE: For this to work, the game needs to have set startboxes.
                          It won't work in FFA mode without boxes.
                          Also, it does not affect Scavengers and Raptors.
WARNING: No Rush Time over 30 minutes may cause performance or stability issues due to excessive unit buildup.
name: No Rush Time [minutes]

desc:
Taxes resource sharing and overflow (engine TODO:)
Set to [0] to turn off. Recommended: [0.4]. (Ranges: 0 - 0.99)
name: Resource Sharing Tax
Disable Unit Sharing
desc: Disable sharing units and structures to allies

name: Disable Assist Ally Construction
desc: Disables assisting allied blueprints and labs.

name: Disable Tech 1.5
desc: Disables: Sea Plane Labs, Hovercraft labs, and Amphibious labs. (Considered Tier 1.5)

name: Disable Tech 2
desc: Disable Tech 2

name: Disable Tech 3
desc: Disable Tech 3

name: Disable Air Units
desc: Disable Air Units

name: Disable Defences
desc: Disables Defensive Structures, apart from basic LLTs and basic AA

name: Disable Metal Extractors
desc: Disable Metal Extractors

name: Disable Energy Converters
desc: Disable Energy Converters

name: Disable Fusion Generators
desc: Disables Normal and Advanced Fusion Energy Generators

name: Disable Tactical Missiles/EMPs
desc: Disables Cortex Tactical Missile Launcher and Armada EMP Missile Launcher

name: Disable Nuclear Missiles
desc: Disable Nuclear Missiles

name: Disable Anti-Nuke Defence
desc: Disables Nuke Interceptor Units and Structures.

name: Disable Long Range Artilery (LRPC)
desc: Disable Long Range Plasma Artilery (LRPC) structures

name: Disable Endgame Artilery (LRPC)
desc: Disable Endgame Long Range Plasma Artilery (LRPC) structures (AKA lolcannons)

name: Other
desc: Options

items.name: Low
items.desc: Set tidal incomes to 13 energy per second

items.name: Medium
items.desc: Set tidal incomes to 18 energy per second

items.name: High
items.desc: Set tidal incomes to 23 energy per second

name: Tidal Strength
desc: Unchanged = map setting, low = 13e/sec, medium = 18e/sec, high = 23e/sec.
This multiplier will be applied on the amount of critters a map will end up with
name: Animal amount
FFA Mode Wreckage
desc: Killed players will blow up but leave wreckages
Percent of unit metal that is left in its wrecks
name: Wreck Metal Percent

desc: Percent of unit metal that is left in its heaps
name: Heap Metal Percent
Cooperative mode
desc: Adds extra commanders to id-sharing teams, 1 com per player

name: Raptors
desc: Various gameplay options that will change how the Raptor Defense is played.
Raptors development discussion.
name: Development Discussion
To Play Add a Raptors AI to the enemy Team: [Add AI], [RaptorsDefense AI]
Base Difficulty
desc: Raptors difficulty

items.name: Growing Spawn Box
items.desc: Hives spawn in limited area that increases over time

items.name: Always Start Box
items.desc: Hives always spawn in raptor start box

name: Hives Placement
desc: Control where hives spawn

name: Endless Mode
desc: When you kill the queen, the game doesn't end, but loops around at higher difficulty instead, infinitely.

name: -- Advanced Options, Change at your own risk.

desc: (Range: 0.1 - 2). How quickly Queen Hatch goes from 0 to 100%
name: Queen Hatching Time Multiplier

desc: (Range: 1 - 100). Number of queens that will spawn.
name: Raptor Queen Count

desc: (Range: 1 - 5). How many times more raptors will spawn per wave.
name: Unit Spawn Per Wave Multiplier

desc: (Range: 1 - 10). Intended to use with heavily modified settings. Makes first waves larger, the bigger the number the larger they are. Cools down within first few waves.
name: First Waves Size Boost

desc: (Range: 1 - 5). How often new waves will spawn. Bigger Number = More Waves
name: Waves Amount Multiplier

desc: (Range: 0.1 - 3). Time before Raptors become active.
name: Grace Period Time Multiplier
Scavengers
desc: Gameplay options for Scavengers gamemode
Scavengers development discussion.
name: Development Discussion
To Play Add a Scavangers AI to the enemy Team: [Add AI], [ScavengersDefense AI]
Base Difficulty
desc: Scavs difficulty

items.name: Growing Spawn Box
items.desc: Beacons spawn in limited area that increases over time

name: Spawn Beacons Placement
desc: Control where spawners appear

name: Endless Mode
desc: When you kill the boss, the game doesn't end, but loops around at higher difficulty instead, infinitely.

name: -- Advanced Options, Change at your own risk.

desc: (Range: 0.1 - 2). How quickly Boss Anger goes from 0 to 100%.
name: Boss Preparation Time Multiplier

desc: (Range: 1 - 20). Number of bosses that will spawn.
name: Scavengers Boss Count

desc: (Range: 1 - 5). How many times more scavs will spawn per wave.
name: Unit Spawn Per Wave Multiplier

desc: (Range: 1 - 5). How often new waves will spawn. Bigger Number = More Waves
name: Waves Amount Multiplier
Extras
desc: Extra options

name: Extra options for shaking up the gameplay or balancing. Not intended for ranked games.
Extra Units Pack
desc: Pack of units that didn't make it to the main game roster. Balanced for PvP

name: Scavengers Units Pack
desc: Units made for Scavengers, mostly silly and unbalanced for PvP.
Doesn't work if Map Deformation is disabled! <0 = Decrease water level, >0 = Increase water level
name: Water Level

desc: Turns water into Lava
name: Water Is Lava

desc: Lava level periodicially cycles height when tides are present

items.name: Enable/Override
items.desc: Lava tides will use these settings over the map defaults

items.name: Disable
items.desc: Lava will not have tides, even on maps that normally have it

name: Lava Tides
Lava Tide Mode
desc: Toggle whether lava starts at high or low tide.
Lava level at high tide
name: Lava High Tide Level

desc: Time in seconds lava waits at high tide
name: Lava High Tide Time

desc: Lava level at low tide
name: Lava Low Tide Level

desc: Time in seconds lava waits at low tide
name: Lava Low Tide Time
Advanced Tide Rhythm
desc: Table with format {MapHeight (elmo), Rate (elmo/s), Dwell Time (s)}, e.g. {0, 6, 60},{100, 3, 20}

name: Ruins
desc: Remains of the battles once fought

name: Lootboxes
desc: Random drops of valuable stuff.

name: Evolving Commanders
desc: Commanders evolve, gaining new weapons and abilities.
Discord discussion about Evolving Commanders.
name: Feedback thread
EvoCom: Leveling Method
desc: Dynamic: Commanders evolve to keep up with the highest power player. Timed: Static Evolution Rate
(Range 0.1x - 3x Multiplier) Adjusts the thresholds at which Dynamic evolutions occur
name: EvoCom: Evolution Mult.

desc: (Range 0.1 - 20 Minutes) Rate at which commanders will evolve if Timed method is selected.
name: EvoCom: Evolution Time

desc: (Range 2 - 10) Changes the Evolving Commanders maximum level
name: EvoCom: Max Level

desc: (Range 0.1 - 10) Does not affect leveling! Changes the rate at which Evolving Commanders gain Experience.
name: EvoCom: Commander XP Multiplier
Commander Respawning
desc: Commanders can build one Effigy. The first one is free and given for you at the start. When the commander dies, the Effigy is sacrificed in its place.

items.name: Enabled
items.desc: Quick Start alone, deducts 400 energy and 800 metal from starting resources.

items.name: Enabled: Discounted First Factory
items.desc: Quick Start The commander's first factory is discounted at any time. Deducts 400 energy and 800 metal from starting resources.

items.name: First Factory Discount Only
items.desc: No base budget, only first factory discount. No deduction from starting resources.

items.name: Disabled
items.desc: Disabled quick start for all game modes.

name: Quick Start
desc: Each player gets pre-game resources to spend on structures to be instantly spawned at the beginning of the game.
Discord discussion about quick start.
name: Feedback thread

items.name: Default
items.desc: Uses the default amount based on game mode

name: Quick Start Base Budget
desc: How much pre-game resources you have to spend on pre-queuing structures.

name: Enable Quick Start Overrides
desc: Allow overriding quick start range and budget (for debugging/modding).
Override the quick start build range when overrides are enabled (values below 200 are clamped to 200).
name: Override Quick Start Range

desc: Override the quick start starting resources when overrides are enabled.
name: Override Quick Start Budget

desc: (Range 0.5 - 5). How much buildpower commander drones should have
name: ComDrones: Buildpower Multiplier

desc: How many assist drones per commander should be spawned
name: ComDrones: Count
ComDrones: Use Air Drones
desc: Switch between aircraft drones and amphibious vehicle drones.

items.name: Hard
items.desc: Fast revival rate, stronger Scavenger Zombies.

items.name: Nightmare
items.desc: Extreme revival rate, stronger Scavenger Zombies, 2-5 spawn per corpse.

name: Experimental
desc: Experimental options

name: Options for testing various new and unfinished features. Not intended for ranked games.
When any of these options are changed, there is no guarantee they will work properly, especially when combined.
Season 3 balance test
desc: Test balance patch for the upcoming season. Nerfs funneling resources into just a single T2 base, by changing eco stats as well as nerfing units like Tzar and Fatboy. Also a variety of other changes, like an Incisor nerf and a Banshee buff. Full changelist below

items.name: Enabled
items.desc:
Enable all community balance changes
Commando
Termite
Centurion
Sprinter
Castro

name: Community Balance Patch Jan '26
desc:
Enable community balance patch changes
(overwrites changes in official seasonal balance test)
Community Balance Patch changelog
name: Changelog

desc: Discord discussion about Community Balance Patch.
name: Feedback Thread
(CBP) Commando
desc:
+130 jammer range (150 -> 280)
+300 radar and LoS (900 -> 1200, 600 -> 900)
Add light and heavy mines to build options
80% EMP resist
2s self-destruct timer
x2 autoheal (9 -> 18)
Weapon: Cannon -> Laser
100 dmg, 50 vs air (w/ laser damage falloff)
2 shots/second (unchanged)
100% accuracy
8 aoe, 20 e/shot
300 -> 450 range
Targets air units
Can be built in amphibious complex

name: (CBP) Termite
desc: Added stealth

name: (CBP) Centurion
desc:
Weapon range: 325 (from 330)
Sight distance: 330 (from 350)

name: (CBP) Sprinter
desc:
Energy cost: 3500 (from 4140)
Acceleration: 0.37 (from 0.414)
Speed: 115 (from 111.3)
Turn-in-place angle: 115° (from 90°)
Turn-in-place speed: 2.75 (from 2.4486)
Turn rate: 1320 (from 1644.5)
Sight distance: 380 (from 351)
Weapon: 18 AoE (from 16), 230 range (from 220), 15/5 damage (from 12/4)

name: (CBP) Castro
desc:
Build time: 9950 (from 4570)
Energy cost: 8500 (from 5200)
Energy upkeep: 40 (from 25)
Health: 790 (from 1070)
Metal cost: 240 (from 115)
Radar jammer distance: 500 (from 360)

name: Legion Faction
desc: 3rd experimental faction
Discord discussion about Legion faction.
name: Development Discussion
Easy Sharing Tax
desc: Anti co-op sharing tax mod. Overwrites other tax settings. Don't combine with other sharing restriction mods, everything you need is included with easy tax.
Easy Sharing Tax description.
name: Changelog
Tech Blocking
desc: Enable tech level blocking system that prevents building units until sufficient tech points are accumulated
Discord discussion about Tech Blocking.
name: Feedback thread

desc: Amount of tech points required to unlock Tech 2 units
name: Tech 2 Threshold

desc: Amount of tech points required to unlock Tech 3 units
name: Tech 3 Threshold
Multiply Threshold by Player Count
desc: If enabled, tech thresholds are per player. If disabled thresholds are absolute for the whole team
Multiplier for tech points gained when creating units (0 = disabled, units give no bonus tech points)
name: Unit Creation Reward Multiplier
Tech Split
desc: Adds a new tier between T1 and T2 for bots and vehicles

name: Tech Split Balance Test
desc: Adjusts the balance of units in the proposed tech split.

name: Low Priority Pacifists
desc: Makes the automatic target priority of non-combat mobile units much lower, so they must be intentionally targeted.
Discord discussion about low priority pacifists.
name: Feedback thread
Lategame Rebalance
desc: T2 defenses and anti-air is weaker, giving more time for late T2 strategies to be effective.  Early T3 unit prices increased. Increased price of calamity/ragnarock by 20% so late T3 has more time to be effective.

name: Air Rework
desc: Prototype version with more maneuverable, slower air units and more differentiation between them.

name: Skyshift: Air Rework
desc: A complete overhaul of air units and mechanics

name: EMP Rework
desc: EMP is changed to slow units movement and firerate, before eventually stunning.

name: Juno Rework
desc: Juno stuns certain units (such as radars and jammers) rather than magically deleting them

name: Release Candidate Units
desc: Adds additional units to the game which are being considered for mainline integration and are balanced, or in end tuning stages.  Currently adds Printer, Siegebreaker, Phantom (Core T2 veh), Shockwave (Arm T2 EMP Mex), and Drone Carriers for armada and cortex

name: Proposed Naval Balance Tweaks
desc: Modoption used to test specific balance adjustments dedicated towards naval units.
Discord discussion about naval balance tweaks.
name: Feedback thread
Forge Volcano Event
desc: Enable the cinematic volcano eruption event on Forge v2.3.

name: Factory Costs Test Patch
desc: Cheaper and more efficient factories, more expensive nanos, and slower to build higher-tech units. Experimental, not expected to be balanced by itself - a test to try how the game plays if each player is more able to afford their own T2 factory, while making assisting them less efficient.

name: Picture-in-picture window
desc: Enables the picture-in-picture window showing a minimap-sized view of a chosen location.
Thread to report bugs and suggest improvements.
name: Report Bugs
GameModes
desc: Game Modes

name: Dynamic Ally Victory
desc: Ingame alliance should count for game over condition.
Multiplies AI resource income
name: AI Income Multiplier
Default Decals
desc: Use the default explosion decals instead of Decals GL4

name: _DEV
desc: tab that should be hidden by chobby

name: Icon Dev Mode
desc: (Don't use in normal games) Forces teamcolors to be an specific one, for all teams

name: Debug Commands
desc: A pipe separated list of commands to execute at [gameframe]:luarules fightertest|100:forcequit...

name: Animation Cleanup
desc: Use animations from the BOSCleanup branch

name: Pushresistance
desc: Enable to do desync test by the use of pushresistance

name: dummy to hide some modoptions
desc: This is a dummy to hide some modoptions to not bloat the changed options panel with unneeded information
Spads (Multiplayer) / Skirmish Interface (Singleplayer) fed, auto-overwriten
name: Year

desc: Spads (Multiplayer) / Skirmish Interface (Singleplayer) fed, auto-overwriten
name: Month

desc: Spads (Multiplayer) / Skirmish Interface (Singleplayer) fed, auto-overwriten
name: Day

desc: Spads (Multiplayer) / Skirmish Interface (Singleplayer) fed, auto-overwriten
name: Hour

desc:
BITMASK to be used via custom ui, only visible when boss
Set to [0] To disable.
Otherwise: 0th, 1st and 2nd bit are armada, cortex and legion respectively.
Offset by 3 for each consecutive team.
If a team's bitmask is 0, All are Enabled.
Example: Armada VS Cortex VS Legion: 273 or 100 010 001 or 256 + 16 + 1
name:
Faction Limiter: ON
BITMASK
MapMetadata
desc: mapmetadata tab that should be hidden by chobby, which would have ideally been achieved by just not listing it and the following options here in the first place, but then SPADS refuses to set the modoption

name: Hidden map metadata options that are supposed to be set automatically by lobby/spads based on the map name.
Map Metadata: StartPos
desc: StartPos configuration. Format is: base64url(zlib(json))

name: Cheats
desc: Options that alter the game balance in unintended way, Use at your own risk.

name: Warning: changing these options will alter the intended game experience and may have bad results. Proceed at your own risk!
When any of these options are changed, there is no guarantee they will work properly, especially when combined.
Dynamic Cheats
desc: Cheats marked as [Dynamic] react to the game state and are suspended when the opposition is losing

items.name: Default
items.desc: Disabled, unless other features use it

items.name: AI Only
items.desc: All AI except Scavengers and Raptors

items.name: All
items.desc: AI and Player Teams both excluding Scavengers and Raptors

name: No Resource Wasting
desc: [Dynamic] Increases Buildpower for the affected team's builders and factories to prevent resource

name: Allow Hostile AI Spawn Placement
desc: When enabled, allows enemy allyteams to view and place enemy AI start positions during the pregame
(Range 0 - 10 000). Determines amount of metal and metal storage that each player will start with
name: Starting Metal

desc: (Range 1000 - 20 000). Only works if it's higher than Starting metal. Determines amount of metal and metal storage that each player will start with
name: Starting Metal Storage

desc: (Range 0 - 10 000). Determines amount of energy and energy storage that each player will start with
name: Starting Energy

desc: (Range 1000 - 20 000). Only works if it's higher than Starting energy. Determines amount of energy and energy storage that each player will start with
name: Starting Energy Storage
Apply Bonus to Starting Resources
desc: If enabled, multiplies each players starting resources with their bonus.
(Range 0.1 - 10). Stacks up with the three options below.
name: Overall Resource Income

desc: (Range 0.1 - 2). lower means you get less metal per energy converted
name: Energy Conversion Efficiency

desc: (Range 0.1 - 10). Also affects unit death explosions.
name: Weapon Damage
